title: Generic Observation, Relationship, and State-Write Substrate
description: Provide one approval-bound append-only state-write operation across human and nonhuman subject classes using identical Enki contracts.
acceptance_criteria: PERSON, ORGANIZATION, and PROJECT reuse identical state-write contracts and collections
Every write is content-addressed, preflighted, approval-bound, journaled, receipted, auditable, and recoverable
Unknown references, subject or domain leakage, tampering, duplicate conflicts, and cross-plan replay fail closed
Partial observation and relationship writes recover by exact retry without duplicate effects
TEST state-write execution cannot reach a production effect
Declared state-write paths have automated coverage

evidence.description: Generic governed state-write implementation and tests.
